differential_diagnoses: Persistent pulmonary hypertension of the newborn
next_steps: Contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) of the chest to characterize pulmonary lesions
Genetics consultation for DICER1 syndrome screening
Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the chest if CT is inconclusive
Surgical consultation for potential biopsy or resection of persistent opacities
Review of pathology findings for evidence of pleuropulmonary blastoma
